name: Italian Garlic/Pepper Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon Very Coarsely Ground Pepper (or to taste)
1/2 - 1 cup Parmesan Cheese, cut into 1/2 inch squares.
recipeInstructions:
1. In the final kneading stage of the dough, add the garlic powder, ground pepper, and grated Parmesan cheese. Mix gently until fully incorporated.
2. Bake the bread according to your preferred method (oven or bread machine).
3. Enjoy your homemade Italian Garlic/Pepper Bread!
